records.ety: [OE. astronomie, F. astronomie, L. astronomia, fr. Gr. <?/, fr. <?/ astronomer; 'asth`r star + <?/ to distribute, regulate. See Star, and Nomad.]

quotes: Not from the stars do I my judgment pluck; And yet methinks I have astronomy.

defs: The science which treats of the celestial bodies, of their magnitudes, motions, distances, periods of revolution, eclipses, constitution, physical condition, and of the causes of their various phenomena.
A treatise on, or text-book of, the science.
